candidate.problem: The possible_api_key regex matched only the key prefix and delimiter, so redaction could leave short secret values visible.
candidate.risk: Key/value secrets that are too short for the long-token pattern could still leak in redacted previews.
candidate.decision: Extend possible_api_key to include an optional non-whitespace value segment.

red.evidence: The new test failed because the value remained after [REDACTED_POSSIBLE_API_KEY].

green.evidence: The focused test passed after the possible_api_key regex redacted the key/value pair.

full_verification.evidence: 10 UI helper tests passed, Vite build passed, 40 Rust library tests passed, 14 CLI tests passed, doc-tests passed, and strict clippy passed.

staged_checks.evidence: gitleaks scanned staged code and found no leaks.
